description_long: This chaise features a minimalist, modern design with a rectangular, cushioned seat and an adjustable backrest. The upholstery is a smooth, solid light beige or off-white fabric, providing a clean and contemporary look. The frame is constructed from what appears to be wood or metal with a warm brown finish, giving it both stability and a touch of elegance. The legs are straight and squared, supporting the chaise with a sturdy, geometric structure. The backrest is angled and can be adjusted, supported by a visible mechanism on the side. There are no armrests, emphasizing the streamlined silhouette and maximizing lounging space.
description: A modern, cushioned chaise with a light beige fabric, adjustable backrest, and straight brown frame and legs. The design is sleek and armless, ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the seat and the upright backrest, highlighting the clean, rectangular lines and absence of armrests.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the adjustable backrest mechanism, the full length of the chaise, and the straight, supportive legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the backrest and the open frame structure beneath the seat, emphasizing the sturdy support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the angled backrest and the frame's structural details.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a single, flat, rectangular panel that is slightly angled and adjustable, with no visible segmentation, tufting, or decorative elements. It is upholstered in the same solid fabric as the seat and supported by a simple mechanical structure.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, squared, and appear to be made of wood or metal with a brown finish. They are simple and unadorned, contributing to the modern, minimalist aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid, smooth fabric with no visible pattern, tufting, or quilting. The surface appears uniform and untextured.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, continuous cushion that covers both the seat and the backrest, with no separate or loose cushions visible. The cushion is integrated into the frame for a streamlined appearance.
